name: Spice Merchant
description: Traveled further than most people in this town can imagine. Every pouch and jar comes with a story about the land it came from — some of them even true.
dialogue_hooks: offering a free sample of something you've never smelled before
telling a story about the land where this spice grows
asking if you've traveled to a specific distant region
warning about troubles along a particular trade route
voice_patterns: exotic storyteller — every spice has a legend attached
precise merchant — knows weights, grades, and fair prices to the grain
weary traveler — the romance of the road has worn thin
enthusiastic educator — genuinely wants you to appreciate the difference between varieties

schedule.morning: unpacking and arranging display at market
schedule.evening: packing up, counting coin, writing letters home
schedule.night: at the inn, trading stories with other travelers
